tcm_line_occlusions: {"LU7":["➣ Acute dyspnoea: Lièquē LU-7 and Wàilíng ST-26 (Song of Points).","➣ Oedema: Lièquē LU-7, Yánggǔ SI-5, Hégǔ L.I.-4, Jiānshǐ P-5, Yánglíngquán GB-34, Yīngǔ KID-10, Wàilíng ST-26, Qūquán LIV-8, Jiěxī ST-41, Xiàngǔ ST-43, Fùliū KID-7, Gōngsūn SP-4, Lìduì ST-45, Chōngyáng ST-42, Yīnlíngquán SP-9, Wèishū BL-21, Shuǐfēn REN-9 and Shénquè REN-8 (Great Compendium).","➣ One-sided wind (hemiplegia): Lièquē LU-7 and Chōngyáng ST-42 (Great Compendium).","➣ One-sided or generalised headache: Lièquē LU-7 and Tàiyuān LU-9 (Ode of Xi-hong).","➣ Deviation of the mouth: Lièquē LU-7 and Dìcāng ST-4 (Supplementing Life).","➣ Deviation of the mouth and face: Lièquē LU-7 and Wángǔ GB-12 (Supplementing Life).","➣ Childhood fright-epilepsy: Lièquē LU-7 and the luo-connecting point of the yangming (Systematic Classic).","➣ Pain of the genitals: Lièquē LU-7, Yīnlíngquán SP-9 and Shàofǔ HE-8 (Formulas for the Living).","➣ Heat in the palms: Lièquē LU-7, Jīngqú LU-8 and Tàiyuān LU-9 (Great Compendium).","➣ Malaria with chills and fever: Lièquē LU-7, Hòuxī SI-3, Qiángǔ SI-2 and Shàozé SI-1 (Thousand Ducat Formulas).","➣ Poor memory: Lièquē LU-7, Gāohuāngshū BL-43, Shéndào DU-11 and Yōumén KID-21 (Supplementing Life).","➣ Poor memory: Lièquē LU-7, Xīnshū BL-15, Shénmén HE-7, Zhōngwǎn REN-12, Wàilíng ST-26, Shàohǎi HE-3 and moxa Bǎihuì DU-20 (Outline of Medicine).","➣ Frequent laughter: Lièquē LU-7, Dàlíng P-7, Rénzhōng DU-26 and Yángxī L.I.-5 (Great Compendium).","➣ Stabbing qi pain of the two breasts: Tàiyuān LU-9 and Lièquē LU-7 (Song of Points)."],"LU2":["➣ Chest pain: Yúnmén LU-2, Zhōngfǔ LU-1, Yǐnbài SP-1, Qímén LIV-14, Fèishū BL-13, Húnmén BL-47 and Dàlíng P-7 (Thousand Ducat Formulas)."],"13 Ghost Points":[],"Asthma":["➣ 1. EXCESS","➣ Wind-Cold: Thin sputum, rapid breathing, chills/fever, no sweat, no thirst.","➣ T: White coating P: Superficial, tense","➣ Points: BL 13, BL 12, GV 14, LU 7, LI 4","➣ Phlegm-Heat: Short/rapid breath, coarse voice, thick yellow sputum, restlessness, dry mouth.","➣ T: Thick yellow/sticky P: Rolling, rapid","➣ Points: BL 13, Dingchuan, CV 22, LU 5, ST 40","➣ 2. DEFICIENCY","➣ Lung Def: Short/rapid breath, feeble voice/cough, sweating on exertion.","➣ T: Pale P: Deficiency type","➣ Points: BL 13, LU 9, ST 36, SP 3","➣ Kidney Def: Chronic wheezing on exertion, neck indrawing, lassitude, cold limbs.","➣ T: Pale P: Deep, thready","➣ Points: KI 3, BL 23, BL 13, CV 17, CV 6","➣ Sup Points: GV12, BL43 (Persistent Asthma)","➣ Sup Points: CV12, BL12 (Spleen Xu)"]}
